org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.HttpPartType

Packages that use HttpPartType
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart
Core HTTP-part types and enumerations shared across Juneau's HTTP-part marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart that return HttpPartType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpPartType
    HttpPartType.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static HttpPartType[]
    HttpPartType.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

  • Uses of HttpPartType in org.apache.juneau.http

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http with parameters of type HttpPartType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Optional<String>
    HttpParts.getName(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type)
    Returns the name of the specified part type by reading the @Header, @Query, @FormData, or @Path annotation on the class.
    static boolean
    HttpParts.isHttpPart(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type)
    Returns true if the specified type is a transport-neutral part type for the given HttpPartType.

  • Uses of HttpPartType in org.apache.juneau.http.classic

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.classic with parameters of type HttpPartType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Optional<String>
    HttpParts.getName(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type)
    Returns the name of the specified part type.
    static boolean
    HttpParts.isHttpPart(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type)
    Returns true if the specified type is a part type.
